baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Commit all current changes, splitting them into logical commits.
evals.expected_output: The agent reviews the dirty tree, groups related changes, validates where appropriate, and creates intentional commits without reverting user work.
assertions: Inspects git status and diffs before staging.
Does not include unrelated generated or ignored files accidentally.
